MODULE: cosmos.network.unified_a2a
FILE: cosmos/network/unified_a2a.py (177 lines)
CATEGORY: network

DESCRIPTION: UNIFIED A2A PROTOCOL - SEMANTIC ROUTER
======================================

Simplifies the fragmented A2A Mesh and A2A Protocol into a single, unified,
context-aware routing layer. Eliminates echo chambers by routing semantically
based on urgency, capability, and quantum state, rather than blind 

CLASSES:
- RoutedMessage
- UnifiedA2ARouter: The streamlined A2A communication layer.
Replaces redundant broadcaster and prot
  Methods: def register_agent(self, agent_id: str, capabilities: List[str], is_quantum_capable: bool=False)
  Methods: async def dispatch_task(self, source: str, task_description: str, required_caps: List[str], urgency:
  Methods: def register_handler(self, agent_id: str, handler)
  Methods: async def start_routing(self)

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_unified_router() -> UnifiedA2ARouter
